title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: Device Home Screen fails to display "i" icon for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
3. Observe the device card area for a connected Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. Check that the device name is displayed.
5. If the device is unencrypted or has limited support, verify that an "i" icon is shown next to the device name.
6. Verify that a green dot with the label "Connected" is visible.
7. Verify that the device image is displayed.
8. If quick settings are enabled, verify that quick settings controls are shown.
9. Verify that the "..." (more options) button is present.
10. Verify that battery icons are displayed.
11. Verify that the firmware version is displayed.
expected: The Home screen displays: Device Name (with an "i" icon for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support), a green dot with "Connected" label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), "..." button, battery icons, and firmware version. The "i" icon is visible for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support.
